text:
Meeting header:
Date: 2027-07-08
Start: 15:30 UTC
Duration: ~55 minutes
Attendees: Ava Chen (Redwood AE), Diego Martinez (Redwood SE), Priya Rao (Horizon Health), Marcus Lee (Horizon Infra), Samantha Ortiz (Product)

Summary:
Quick Optimize console walkthrough focused on quantization profiles (INT8 vs FP8), runbook for profile selection, and how to balance throughput/latency with clinical fidelity for Horizon Health's triage & summarization workloads. Customer wants an action plan and a short pilot to validate latency & QA metrics.

Topics covered:
- baseline profiling and what data we need
- INT8 sensitivity vs FP8 for token-level hallucination risk
- fallback rules in Optimize (when to switch to FP8 or model variant)
- console demo: profile editor, heatmaps, per-prompt quality delta
- security/hosting notes for PII in health prompts

Notes / Shared links:
- Sandbox link: https://app...

text:
Meeting header:
Date: 2026-03-21
Time: 15:00 PDT
Duration: ~54 minutes
Attendees: Jordan Blake, Priya Singh, Luis Marten, Ava Romero (Redwood); Alex Navarro, Mei Chen, Sam Ortiz, Rina Patel (Horizon Health)

Summary:
Quick sync to close out the postmortem actions from last week's outage, confirm safety-net/oncall handover for the pilot, review outstanding security/compliance blockers, and plan a low-risk benchmark in Horizon staging. Tone: pragmatic, a little tense but cooperative.

Topics:
- Root-cause recap and lingering unknowns
- Safety-net (fallbacks + graceful degrade) responsibilities
- Data residency and KMS questions from compliance
- Staging benchmark plan + KPIs
- Next steps and owners

Action items (brief): see metadata list above

Transcript body:
